shared_context.goal: Rewrite blind-box scene_expansion_items as medium-scale scene fragments while preserving four-pool compatibility, adding quality checks, and syncing stable docs.
epics: EPIC-001 rule baseline and compatibility contract
EPIC-003 quality boundary and regression gates
EPIC-004 doc sync and maintainer review
constraints: Do not add a fifth pool.
Do not change scene IDs, category names, runtime extraction logic, animal pools, expression pools, image fetching, or renaming behavior.
Keep four pool keys unchanged and keep 50 unique UTF-8 strings per pool.
Use a single-owner sequential edit for blind_boxes.py.
Update Game content extraction/agents.md first, then check agents.md, README.md, and .gitignore only if needed.
verification_commands: python -B -m py_compile 'Game content extraction\内容抽取.py' 'Game content extraction\data\blind_boxes.py'
